creator: nospam@morphium.org
text:
Hello,

I am running a fresh 10.0-RC4 install as a desktop workstaion, and have had 3 kerenl panics over the last week I have been using the system. I have info in /var/crash I can provide, however the core.txt files are all over 100KB & the vmcore files are 1.2-1.8 GB in size.

How-To-Repeat: I have not yet been able to attribute these crashes to one consistent action or process, therefore I cannot specify how to repeat. However, in that I have had 3 crashes thus far, I do believe at this time that it is ultimately a repeatable problem.
